headline: Britt Lower Tackles Netflix Thriller with Sam Worthington in 'I Will Find You'
lede: Fresh off her Emmy-nominated turn in 'Severance', Britt Lower is set to join Sam Worthington in a high-stakes Netflix mystery that promises intense legal drama.
body:
Netflix is prepping a gripping legal thriller that reunites 'Severance' breakout Britt Lower with action star Sam Worthington in 'I Will Find You', a Harlan Coben adaptation dropping this June.

Based on Coben's intricate narrative style, the series follows a desperate legal journey where Lower's character works to exonerate Worthington's wrongfully convicted protagonist. The streaming platform is banking on the project's star power and Coben's proven track record of generating pulse-pounding narratives that translate seamlessly to the screen.

Lower, who captivated audiences with her nuanced performance in Apple TV+'s critically acclaimed 'Severance', brings her trademark intensity to a role that requires both investigative acumen and emotional depth. Worthington, known for his roles in blockbuster franchises, appears poised to deliver a more vulnerable performance as a man fighting to prove his innocence.

Netflix has been aggressively expanding its Harlan Coben adaptation slate, with several successful international translations of the author's work. 'I Will Find You' represents another strategic move in the platform's continued investment in compelling crime narratives that resonate globally.

Production details remain closely guarded, but early teasers suggest a complex narrative that will challenge viewers' perceptions of justice and redemption.
key_facts: Harlan Coben adaptation starring Britt Lower and Sam Worthington
Part of Netflix's Coben adaptation strategy
